pass_2_evaluation.rationale: AI/ML Engineering is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of AI/ML. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (AI/ML Engineering), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.431). External validation of this skill KSA for the Director of AI/ML role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: O*NET, DCWF, and ML engineering job market data confirm AI/ML competencies for technical data leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of AI/ML Engineering for the Director of AI/ML is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: AI/ML Engineering skill KSA is within scope for the Director of AI/ML at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
